name: Green Ninja
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>若い</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>グリーン</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>忍</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>にん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>者</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゃ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: If a monster(s) is Special Summoned to your field face-up (except during the Damage Step): You can target 1 of them; Special Summon this card from your hand, and if you do, change that monster to face-down Defense Position. If this card is sent from the hand or field to the GY: You can target 1 monster on the field; change it to face-up Attack Position or face-down Defense Position. You can only use each effect of "Green Ninja" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If a monster(s) is Special Summoned to your field face-up (except during the Damage Step): You can target 1 of them; Special Summon this card from your hand, and if you do, change that monster to face-down Defense Position. You can only use each effect of "Green Ninja" once per turn.

summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
